temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) Two men in dark suits walk across a wet, reflective rooftop at night. The man in front has a distinctive, pale, bald head, while the man behind him has dark hair. They walk with purpose, their figures silhouetted against the distant, out-of-focus lights of the city. (Storyline: This opening shot introduces two mysterious, powerful-looking characters, establishing a serious and somber tone for the story.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A dramatic, orchestral score begins, building a sense of tension and importance.)
(00:04-00:05) A close-up shot focuses on the pale, bald man's face in profile. His expression is stern and intense as he looks forward, with a single, bright light source creating a strong rim light around his head and shoulders. (Storyline: This close-up highlights the character's stern and intimidating presence, suggesting he is a key figure of authority or power.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The dramatic orchestral music continues, swelling to a crescendo.)
